title: 2026年03月20日 周五
summary: 中东局势持续外溢：以色列称对伊朗气田“单独行动”，霍尔木兹海峡通行与油价波动成为全球市场的共同焦点。与此同时，中国科技议程密集推进，中关村论坛与世界互联网大会议题直指“科技—产业融合”和AI鸿沟治理。

sections.overview: 中东冲突最新表态与能源通道数据同框出现：气田袭击、海峡通行和油价的连锁反应正快速传导到全球风险定价。另一条主线是美国军工与AI军用化加速，现代化火炮与无人机产能成为“可交付能力”的新比拼。

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
items.body: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
items.insight: 以方称“单独行动”意在切割盟友与冲突升级责任，真实影响取决于伊朗报复尺度与海上能源通道能否保持开放。

items.title: US-Israel strikes have destroyed Iran’s ability to enrich uranium, Netanyahu say
items.body: Israeli prime minister suggests war will end ‘a lot faster than people think’
items.insight: “摧毁浓缩能力”的说法若缺乏可验证证据，更多是在争夺舆论与市场预期；但它足以短期压制油价风险溢价。

items.title: Nearly 100 ships pass the Hormuz Strait - who is getting through?
items.body: Just under 100 ships have passed thorough the Strait of Hormuz since the start of March, according to data analysed by BBC Verify.
items.insight: 海峡通行量是判断封锁风险的硬指标：船只能否持续过境，直接决定保险费、运费与能源价格波动的下限。

items.title: Oil eases from day’s highs as Israeli leader’s comments temper market nerves
items.body: Wall Street recovers after Benjamin Netanyahu says US-Israeli strikes have destroyed Tehran’s ability to enrich uranium
items.insight: 油价从高位回落显示市场对最坏情景暂时降温，但这种回落往往脆弱，任何新打击点都可能迅速反转风险偏好。

items.title: High-speed combat drone production starts at new US Anduril plant in days
items.body: Anduril Industries will begin building its new loyal wingman drones in the coming days at a new facility in Ohio.
items.insight: 无人机“几天内投产”强调的是工业化交付速度，意味着未来空战竞争不只拼性能，也拼产能与成本曲线。

items.title: The case for the US Army to procure the KNDS RCH 155 howitzer
items.body: The U.S. Army faces a critical modernization crossroads in field artillery. The KNDS RCH 155 offers a transformative answer.

items.title: Forum eyes tech-industrial innovation - Chinadaily.com.cn
items.body: The 2026 Zhongguancun Forum will spotlight the theme of full integration between technological and industrial innovation, an official with the Ministry of Science and Technology said on Wednesday.

items.title: 解读全国两会精神 2026年第一期工商联大讲堂在京举办--经济·科技--人民网
items.body: 人民日报 人民日报海外版 中国汽车报 中国能源报 健康时报 证券时报 国际金融报网 讽刺与幽默 中国城市报 新闻战线 人民论坛 环球人物 中国经济周刊 民生周刊 国家人文历史 人民周刊 人民数字 · 全国重点实验室 环球网 海外网 人民图片 人民网研究院 人民慕课 · 写易智能创作引擎 人民网智慧党建体验中心 828企业服务平台 人民云 ... 人民网北京3月19日电 （记者王震）3月16日下午，全国工商联以“学习两会精神，奋进‘十五五’”为主题，在京举办2026年第一期工商联大讲堂，邀请有关专家、领导解读全国两会精神。

sections.title: 今日看点

sections.overview: 国内议程围绕“把两会精神落到产业与民企发展”展开，工商联大讲堂与中关村论坛释放出更明确的科技—产业融合信号。资本市场方面，A股波动、存款利率下探与金价拉锯同步出现，风险偏好仍在重定价。

items.title: Forum eyes tech-industrial innovation - Chinadaily.com.cn
items.body: The 2026 Zhongguancun Forum will spotlight the theme of full integration between technological and industrial innovation, an official with the Ministry of Science and Technology said on Wednesday.
items.insight: 中关村论坛把“科技—产业全融通”定为主轴，信号是政策与资源将更集中投向可规模化落地的硬科技与制造升级。

items.title: WIC summit targets AI divide in developing economies, small island states - Chin
items.body: To address the stark disparities in the level of digital and AI development across the Asia-Pacific region, the World Internet Conference has unveiled a targeted strategy to ensure that developing economies and small island states are not left ...
items.insight: 把AI鸿沟放到发展中经济体与小岛国家，说明数字治理正在从技术供给转向公平与规则制定，影响跨境合作框架。

items.title: 解读全国两会精神 2026年第一期工商联大讲堂在京举办--经济·科技--人民网
items.body: 人民日报 人民日报海外版 中国汽车报 中国能源报 健康时报 证券时报 国际金融报网 讽刺与幽默 中国城市报 新闻战线 人民论坛 环球人物 中国经济周刊 民生周刊 国家人文历史 人民周刊 人民数字 · 全国重点实验室 环球网 海外网 人民图片 人民网研究院 人民慕课 · 写易智能创作引擎 人民网智慧党建体验中心 828企业服务平台 人民云 ... 人民网北京3月19日电 （记者王震）3月16日下午，全国工商联以“学习两会精神，奋进‘十五五’”为主题，在京举办2026年第一期工商联大讲堂，邀请有关专家、领导解读全国两会精神。
items.insight: 工商联系统强化两会精神解读，核心在稳预期、强信心：用政策叙事对冲外部不确定性，托住民企投资意愿。

items.title: 债市早参3月19日｜美联储如期维持利率不变 全球债券连涨；多家中小银行中长期存款利率降至1字头_搜狐网
items.body: 【证监会：严肃查处破坏资本市场秩序、侵害中小投资者利益的人和事 坚决清除影响资本市场改革发展的“拦路虎”“绊脚石”】 · 中国证监会3月17日召开2026年全面从严治党暨纪检监察工作会议，会议对全面贯彻落实二...
items.insight: 美联储按兵不动叠加存款利率下探，国内资金端成本与资产端波动并存，利率环境对债市与权益都更“敏感”。

items.title: 价值判断：跌停板的投资机会和风险提示（3月17日）｜证券市场观察_搜狐网
items.body: 3月17日，A股三大指数全线重挫，市场情绪降温。上证指数跌0.85%报4049.91点，深证成指跌1.87%报14039.73点，创业板指领跌2.29%报3280.06点。两市成交额2.21万亿元，较前一交易日缩量1175亿元，资金观望情绪浓厚。全市场超4500只个...
items.insight: 指数大跌与成交缩量提示风险偏好回撤，所谓“跌停机会”更考验仓位纪律与流动性判断，情绪交易风险抬头。

items.title: 黄金涨不动了？国际金价反复拉锯5000美元关口，国内金饰克价已连跌多日_搜狐网
items.body: 在国内金饰方面，多个黄金品牌已连续5天下调金价，截至3月17日，国内多个黄金品牌的足金报价已较月内最高点回调超百元。

items.title: 价值判断：涨停板的投资机会和风险提示（3月17日）｜证券市场观察_搜狐网
items.body: 公司是纯正风电运营商，专注于风力发电项目开发、建设及运营，在低风速风电技术领域处于国内领先地位，受益于"双碳"政策持续推进及风电上网电价稳定保障。3月17日该股涨停报4.55元，涨跌幅9.90%，近五日涨幅高达31.88%，短期涨势迅猛但估值仍处低位。

sections.title: 国内

sections.overview: 以色列对伊朗行动的叙事与美国“安抚市场”的姿态交错，地缘风险与政策信号正在同一时间影响能源与通胀预期。霍尔木兹海峡通行与对伊油制裁松动讨论一冷一热，决定了市场下一步的波动区间。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: As Attacks Shake Markets, Trump Seeks to Reassure America
items.body: President Trump said he would do whatever was necessary to lower oil prices, and his Treasury secretary said the government might even take the paradoxical step of lifting sanctions on some Iranian oi
items.insight: “稳油价”成为美国国内政治任务，市场更关注政策工具（制裁、投放、外交）而非表态本身，预期管理在加码。

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
items.body: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
items.insight: 以方强调特朗普要求“不再攻击”的细节，透露盟友间也在控升级，分歧越公开，越可能影响后续协同行动空间。

items.title: Nearly 100 ships pass the Hormuz Strait - who is getting through?
items.body: Just under 100 ships have passed thorough the Strait of Hormuz since the start of March, according to data analysed by BBC Verify.
items.insight: 谁能通过海峡、以何条件通过，反映伊朗在“展示控制力”和“避免全面断航”之间的策略平衡与谈判筹码。

items.title: US considers lifting sanctions on some Iranian oil
items.body: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent broached waiving sanctions on oil already at sea, which would be a stunning reversal of longstanding American policy.
items.insight: 讨论放松对伊原油制裁是强烈信号：能源供给与通胀压力正在推动政策松动，但也会引发盟友与国内的反弹。

items.title: The Iran War’s Economic Threat to Europe and Asia
items.body: Inflation and its consequences for growth are a growing concern for countries where memories of the 2022 energy crisis are fresh.
items.insight: 欧洲与亚洲担忧重演2022能源冲击，核心不只油价本身，而是通胀再起对利率路径与增长的二次打击。

items.title: Teenager among first to be executed over Iran's anti-government protests
items.body: Saleh Mohammadi, a member of Iran's national wrestling team, was found guilty of killing police officers alongside two other men, state media say.

items.title: Denmark planned to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, reports say
items.body: Denmark's public broadcaster reports that the US operation to seize Venezuela's leader sparked fears it would act against Greenland.

items.title: Bachelorette's new season pulled after Taylor Frankie Paul abuse allegations
items.body: The decision comes after footage emerged appearing to show the reality star in an altercation with her ex-partner.

sections.title: 国际

sections.overview: 美国军力建设呈现两条线：一是体系化能力补课（火炮、扫雷、反无人机、防空军售），二是新质战力的产能兑现（高速战斗无人机工厂）。F-35“先交付后补雷达”的传闻也提示：供应链与战备优先级正在重排。

items.title: Israel forges ahead on ground incursion against Hezbollah in Lebanon
items.body: The operation is separate from the joint U.S.-Israel war on Iran, but the dynamics of each conflict zone will inevitably intersect with each other.
items.insight: 以军对黎地面行动与对伊冲突并行，意味着多战线资源调配压力上升，任何误判都可能触发更广泛的地区卷入。

items.title: US moves to approve more than $16 billion in air defense sales to Middle East
items.body: The packages include systems for the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait and Jordan, and range from counter-drone technology to aircraft munitions.
items.insight: 超160亿美元防空军售显示中东防空与反无人机需求爆发，军贸正在把冲突经验快速转化为采购清单。

items.title: High-speed combat drone production starts at new US Anduril plant in days
items.body: Anduril Industries will begin building its new loyal wingman drones in the coming days at a new facility in Ohio.
items.insight: Anduril新厂投产凸显“忠诚僚机”从概念走向规模制造，未来空中优势将更多由可消耗、可量产平台构成。

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: US poised to accept new F-35s without radars, sources say
items.insight: 若F-35出现“无雷达先接收”，反映的是交付优先与能力后补的现实权衡，也暴露关键航电供应链的不稳定。

items.title: The case for the US Army to procure the KNDS RCH 155 howitzer
items.body: The U.S. Army faces a critical modernization crossroads in field artillery. The KNDS RCH 155 offers a transformative answer.
items.insight: RCH155被推为火炮现代化方案，说明陆战火力正追求更高机动与自动化；但采购成败取决于体系兼容与成本。

items.title: Apache helicopter shoots down drones in Europe for first time in combat exercise
items.body: U.S. soldiers used Apache helicopters to pursue and attack drones in an air-to-air combat training exercise this week.

items.title: Two US counter-mine ships based in the Middle East are now in Singapore, Navy sa
items.body: The USS Santa Barbara and USS Tulsa, which are homeported in Bahrain, arrived in Singapore this week.

items.title: Pentagon comptroller says a ‘generational investment’ is coming, but when?

sections.title: 军事与安全

sections.overview: 油价从高位回落但仍高度敏感，市场把中东战事与通胀复燃风险重新挂钩。印度动用外储护汇、迪拜旅游骤冷等二阶冲击浮现，说明地缘冲突已从“油”扩散到“汇率与服务业”。

items.title: US-Israel strikes have destroyed Iran’s ability to enrich uranium, Netanyahu say
items.body: Israeli prime minister suggests war will end ‘a lot faster than people think’
items.insight: 把战争进展与核能力绑定，是在为市场提供“冲突可控”的叙事锚；一旦事实相悖，油价与风险资产会迅速再定价。

items.title: Oil Declines as US, Israel Seek to Ease Concerns Over Iran War
items.body: Oil dropped from its highest close since July 2022, as the leaders of the US and Israel sought to reassure investors rattled by damage to major Persian Gulf energy facilities.
items.insight: 油价从2022年以来高位回落，体现市场在“供给中断概率”和“政策干预力度”间重新平衡，波动仍将常态化。

items.title: Oil eases from day’s highs as Israeli leader’s comments temper market nerves
items.body: Wall Street recovers after Benjamin Netanyahu says US-Israeli strikes have destroyed Tehran’s ability to enrich uranium
items.insight: 油价回吐涨幅带动美股修复，说明当前市场的主驱动是能源通胀预期；任何海峡消息都可能盖过公司基本面。

items.title: Iran allows handful of favoured ships through Strait of Hormuz
items.body: Passage for vessels is designed to show Iran’s dominance over waterway and limit diplomatic isolation, analysts suspect
items.insight: 允许“少数偏好船只”通行是典型的精准施压：既留出口避免彻底孤立，又能制造不确定性抬升全球航运成本。

items.title: India’s central bank battles to protect rupee from Iran war fallout
items.body: RBI burns through more than $20bn of foreign exchange reserves this month trying to defend currency, say bankers
items.insight: 印度动用逾200亿美元外储护汇，显示外部冲击已传导到新兴市场金融稳定；接下来需关注资本流出与进口账单。

items.title: Asian Stocks Rise in Early Trading as Oil Retreats: Markets Wrap
items.body: Asian equities advanced early on Friday after US stocks rebounded from session lows and oil retreated amid efforts by the US and Israel to ease concerns over the Iran war.

items.title: Dubai tourism reels from Iranian missiles
items.body: Hotels in the UAE are placing staff on unpaid leave and shuttering buildings as occupancy levels plummet

items.title: Iran sets its price to end the war
items.body: Islamic regime is digging in for a protracted conflict as it seeks to ensure the US and Israel will not attack again

sections.title: 财经与市场

sections.overview: 亚马逊收购爬楼配送机器人与OpenAI桌面“超级应用”传闻同日出现：AI正从模型竞争走向终端与场景锁定。与此同时，Cloudflare预警机器人流量将超越人类，互联网的信任与计费体系面临重构。

items.title: OpenAI is planning a desktop ‘superapp’
items.body: OpenAI is working on a desktop "superapp" that merges its ChatGPT app, the Codex AI coding app, and its AI-powered Atlas browser into one app, The Wall Street Journal reports. The company is making th
items.insight: OpenAI桌面“超级应用”一旦成型，将把聊天、编程与代理能力绑进同一入口，竞争焦点转向生态与分发渠道。

items.title: Amazon acquires Rivr, maker of a stair-climbing delivery robot
items.body: Amazon and Jeff Bezos had previously invested in the startup. The deal signals the e-commerce giant's interest in doorstep delivery.
items.insight: 亚马逊收购爬楼配送机器人，直指最后100米效率与人力成本，物流自动化进入更难但更值钱的“非平面场景”。

items.title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
items.body: AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.
items.insight: 机器人流量或在2027超越人类，意味着反爬、验证与内容计费规则都需重写，否则互联网将被“代理”淹没。

items.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing
items.body: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.
items.insight: 贝索斯寻求千亿美元收购改造传统制造，反映AI价值正在从软件溢价转向实体产业的效率红利与资产重估。

items.title: Bluesky announces $100M Series B after CEO transition
items.body: The additional funds have been used to scale Bluesky's team, while the company continues to develop Bluesky's app and the underlying ATProto that powers it.
items.insight: Bluesky完成1亿美元B轮并经历CEO更替，说明去中心化社交仍有资本窗口，但增长与治理模型是最大变量。

items.title: Valve’s huge SteamOS 3.8 update adds long-awaited features — and supports Steam
items.body: Valve has just released SteamOS 3.8.0 in preview, and it's a doozy. Not only is it the first release to support the upcoming Steam Machine living room gaming PC, it comes with long-awaited features fo

items.title: Polymarket continues its partnership spree with a Major League Baseball deal
items.body: MLB is only the latest in a string of recently announced partnerships involving the prediction market.

items.title: Employees had to restrain a dancing humanoid robot after it went wild at a Calif
items.body: A dancing robot in a Haidilao hot pot restaurant boogied down a little too hard.

sections.title: 科技前沿

sections.overview: 新能源与电气化仍是主叙事：风光新增装机纪录与EV大幅降价同向指向“供给更强、竞争更卷”。传统豪华阵营也加速电动化节奏，新BMW i3与GV90等新车信息强化了高端电动的存在感。

items.title: The world added a record 814 GW of wind + solar – reshaping energy fast
items.body: The world just added a record amount of
items.insight: 风光新增装机创纪录，意味着电网消纳、储能与用电侧响应将成为下一瓶颈；新能源车与充电生态会受益。

items.title: These top-selling EVs are $10,000 off right now
items.body: With gas prices surging, driving an
items.insight: 电动车一次性大幅折扣，显示价格战仍未结束，库存与补贴策略叠加将加速洗牌，二线品牌压力更大。

items.title: The new BMW i3 will go on sale soon, but another EV is on its way out
items.body: With the new i3 set to go on sale la
items.insight: 新BMW i3将上市且有车型退出，说明传统车企在电动产品线“做减法+做精品”，资源更集中到盈利车型。

items.title: The Genesis GV90 looks massive charging next to the Hyundai IONIQ 5
items.body: The GV90 is set to arrive a
items.insight: GV90体量与充电对比引发关注，高端电动SUV的关键不只是续航，更是快充效率与补能体验能否匹配车身尺寸。

items.title: LEGO is building a huge solar park at its new US factory
items.body: The LEGO Group is installing a la
items.insight: 乐高自建大型光伏园区，制造业正把可再生能源当作成本与品牌双重资产，供应链碳足迹将更透明可核算。

items.title: Anker SOLIX alternator charger bundles for gen 2 C1000, C2000, F3000 power stati
items.body: Our Thursday Green Deals headliner focuses on the

items.title: 2024，汽车业22大预言-36氪
items.body: 从“蔚小理”到华为、比...们扎堆发布售价50万甚至更高价格的新车型。“再不努力工作，就只能开BBA了”，一度成为社交网络上的热门话题。 · 2024年，它们还想走得更远。蔚来ET9的野心是“去抢BBA最核心的根据地”，理想则要“挑战BBA在中国区的销量”...

items.title: 从2022走向2023，消费品牌的坚持、蜕变和破局重生-36氪
items.body: 让2023年成为消费复苏的一年，企业和平台，都需要做好准备。巨量引擎发布的《2022营销风向标调研报告》显示，近七成受访CMO将品牌建设作为工作重点，2023年，这个趋势无疑会更加显著。

sections.title: 汽车

sections.overview: 地缘冲突对旅游的冲击开始具象化：迪拜酒店业出现停薪与关楼，安全预期正在直接改变预订行为。能源通道与航空成本联动仍将影响中短途出行价格。
sections.title: 旅游

sections.overview: 香港FilMart把AI对影视生产的冲击摆上台面，业内人士直言三年内商业大片可能被AI替代，争议但不可忽视。资本侧也在加速整合，Nexstar完成对Tegna的62亿美元交易，媒体版图继续集中。

items.title: Peter Chan Says AI Will Replace ‘Any Blockbuster or Commercial Film in Three Yea
items.body: Legendary Asian filmmaker Peter Chan Ho-sun issued a stark warning about artificial intelligence at a Hong Kong FilMart co-production panel, predicting that the technology poses an existential threat
items.insight: 陈可辛称三年内AI替代商业大片，冲击的不只是岗位，更是版权、责任与审美标准；行业需要尽快建立生产边界。

items.title: Nexstar Claims Its $6.2 Billion Deal for Tegna Has Closed Following DOJ and FCC
items.body: Nexstar Media Group said it “has closed its acquisition” of Tegna in a $6.2 billion deal that would following approval of the transaction from the FCC and the Department of Justice. The de
items.insight: Nexstar完成62亿美元并购Tegna，媒体集中度进一步提高，地方台与广告议价结构可能被重塑，监管仍是关键变量。

items.title: Short-Form Video, AI-Generated Dramas Power Next Wave of Global Content as FilMa
items.body: As short-form video begins to dominate global viewing habits, a new monetization playbook is emerging — one driven by watch time, scalable content formats and increasingly, AI-generated storytelling.
items.insight: 短剧与AI生成内容结合形成新“货币化脚本”，对于平台是增长引擎，但也会加剧内容同质化与合规压力。

items.title: John Lithgow Considered Quitting ‘Harry Potter’ Over J.K. Rowling’s Anti-Trans V
items.body: As HBO’s upcoming Harry Potter series continues to face backlash before it even debuts, one star is making his stance clear. Following his casting as Dumbledore, John Lithgow recently clarified
items.insight: 《哈利·波特》新剧因罗琳争议引发演员顾虑，说明IP开发已无法与价值观议题切割，舆论风险成为成本项。

items.title: ‘Fast Forever’ Taps Michael Lesslie, Screenwriter of ‘Hunger Games’ Prequels and
items.body: Welcome to the “Fast Family,” Michael Lesslie. On Thursday, “Fast and Furious” star and producer Vin Diesel announced that Lesslie will write the script for Universal’s &
items.insight: 《速度与激情》新项目引入编剧人才，意味着老牌系列寻求叙事升级以对抗观众疲劳，续作成败更取决于口碑。

items.title: ‘Outlander’ Final Season Hits 4-Year Viewership High With Premiere
items.body: The eighth and final season of Starz’s Outlander drew nearly three million multi-platform viewers in its premiere week, a four-year series high, with several more platforms yet to report. The ti

items.title: Natasha Lyonne Posts Health Update Two Months After Relapse: ‘Doing a Whole Lot
items.body: Natasha Lyonne is thanking fans for their support after she revealed in January that she had relapsed and was no longer sober. “Proud to report this kid is doing a whole lot better and back on h

items.title: Danny Pang Supernatural Thriller ‘The Mage’ Lands Hong Kong, Macau Release Via E
items.body: Edko Films has acquired Hong Kong and Macau rights to “The Mage,” the latest feature from Josie Ho and Conroy Chan’s 852 Films, with a theatrical release planned for Q3–Q4 of this ye

sections.title: 娱乐

sections.overview: NCAA首轮冷门与加时鏖战拉满戏剧性，传统强队险过关与“黑马逆袭”同时发生。NBA方面，詹姆斯追平历史出场纪录，耐久度正在改写对职业寿命的认知。

items.title: LeBron ties Parish's record with 1,611th game
items.body: LeBron James tied Robert Parish for the NBA's all-time games-played mark, with the Hall of Famer saying James is "deserving" of breaking the record.
items.insight: 詹姆斯追平历史出场纪录，凸显训练科学与负荷管理的革命；这也将推动联盟重新评估“耐久度”与薪资价值。

items.title: 11-seed VCU overcomes 19-point deficit to hold off 6-seed UNC in OT, books secon
items.body: null
items.insight: NCAA加时逆转是典型锦标赛叙事：临场调整与替补深度比排名更重要，冷门频发往往预示防守强队的价值。

items.title: Duke dodges scare, tips cap to McNamara, Siena
items.body: Duke barely avoided a shocking upset to open the NCAA tournament, with the No. 1 overall seed having to rally from 13 points down and going ahead for good in the final five minutes to beat 16th-seeded
items.insight: 杜克险胜提醒强队也有开局“慢热”风险，单场淘汰制下容错极低，明星球员与战术执行缺一不可。

items.title: Johnston, High Point stun 5th-seeded Badgers
items.body: Chase Johnston made his first 2-point basket of the season to give No. 12 seed High Point an 83-82 victory over fifth-seeded Wisconsin on Thursday in the first round of the NCAA tournament.
items.insight: 12号种子绝杀高排位对手，反映中游球队差距收窄；数据化投篮选择与节奏控制让弱队更容易制造爆冷。

items.title: Sources: NFL to vote on Raiders succession plan
items.body: NFL owners are scheduled to vote on a Raiders succession plan that gives Silver Lake co-chief executive officer Egon Durban the option to purchase a majority stake in the team from longtime owner Mark
items.insight: NFL表决突袭者继任计划，折射球队股权与治理正在金融化；联盟对资本进入的边界，将影响未来估值逻辑。

items.title: Sources: WNBA's new CBA expedites max deals
items.body: A new provision in the WNBA's pending CBA fast-tracks the ability for players on rookie-scale contracts to make maximum and supermax salaries, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Littler fights back from 5-0 down to stun Price
items.body: Luke Littler comes from 5-0 down to stun Gerwyn Price 6-5 in the final of Premier League Darts in Dublin where there were two maximum 170 checkouts in one game.

items.title: Famous night for Forest in season to largely forget
items.body: Nottingham Forest are fighting for Premier League survival but reaching the Europa League quarter-finals could provide hope in an otherwise torrid season.

sections.title: 体育

sections.overview: 创业与融资呈现两极：隐私公司Cloaked单笔融资达3.75亿美元，而教育赛道前两月金额仍在低位徘徊。卫星算力与政府流程数字化平台成新热点，说明“硬科技+合规效率”更受资本偏好。

items.title: Consumer-focused privacy company Cloaked raises $375M as it expands to enterpris
items.body: Cloaked's latest round is a mix of equity and growth funding.
items.insight: Cloaked融资3.75亿美元表明隐私从C端走向企业级合规需求，数据泄露成本上升推动“隐私即服务”成为标配。

items.title: K2 to launch its first high-powered satellite for space compute
items.body: K2's Gravitas is an ambitious project that aims to demonstrate the tech needed to build data centers in space.
items.insight: K2做“太空算力卫星”押注的是低时延与能源条件，若验证成功将开辟新基础设施赛道，但资金与发射风险极高。

items.title: Alphabet’s X has a new spinout, and it’s going after one of the world’s most exp
items.body: Anori aims to shrink the pre-development process by getting all parties, including the city, on a unified platform from the start so that compliance conflicts are surfaced in weeks instead of months o
items.insight: Alphabet X新分拆瞄准审批流程数字化，抓住的是全球最昂贵的“行政摩擦成本”，一旦打通将释放巨大生产率。

items.title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
items.body: Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.
items.insight: Startup Battlefield开放提名，侧面反映早期项目仍需要舞台与背书；对创业者而言，叙事与可演示产品同样重要。

items.title: 1-2月教育行业融资报告：融资总金额500万，低位运行中的结构变化-36氪
items.body: 从整体市场表现来看，2026年前两个月教育行业投融资仍处于明显的低位运行阶段。融资事件数量有限、金额规模较小，反映出资本在教育赛道整体仍保持高度审慎的态度，行业尚未进入明显的融资回暖周期。
items.insight: 2026年前两月教育融资仅500万，行业低迷并非需求消失，而是商业模式与合规不确定性让资金更谨慎。

items.title: 1、2月教育行业融资报告：6家企业共融资4100万人民币，与去年同期相比资本活跃度降低-36氪
items.body: 2024年1月到2月教育行业共发生了6起融资事件，融资总金额为4100万人民币，最大的一笔融资为智慧教育机构管理SaaS系统服务商鲸希教育-小鲸学堂的战略投资。与去年同期相比，融资总金额减少 94.70%，融资事件数量同比减少 ...

items.title: Tools for founders to navigate and move past conflict
items.body: Founders can create frameworks for working through conflict and change when the team is just two or three people, and if done correctly, it can scale with the company.

items.title: 545万网民，抢救活力28-36氪
items.body: 但近年来，国产日化崛起，活力28却江河日下，今年6月，更是被爆长期拖欠员工及导购人员薪资、社保、医保等，已处于“半停摆”状态。

sections.title: 热门方向

sections.overview: 全球健康议题一边是令人警惕的现实：5岁前儿童死亡减少进展放缓；另一边是公共卫生的可复制经验：丹麦阻断艾滋与梅毒母婴传播、智利消除麻风获认证。饮食与体脂分布对心血管风险的新证据，继续推动生活方式干预前置。

items.title: Progress in reducing child deaths slows as 4.9 million children die before age f
items.body: An estimated 4.9 million children died before their fifth birthday in 2024, including 2.3 million newborns, according to new estimates released today. Most of these deaths are preventable
items.insight: 2024年五岁前死亡仍高达490万且降速放缓，意味着疫苗、营养与基层医疗投入遇到瓶颈，资源错配问题凸显。

items.title: Conflict deepens health crisis across Middle East, WHO says
items.body: More than ten days into the latest escalation of conflict in the Middle East, health systems across the Region are coming under strain as injuries and displacement rise, attacks on health care cont
items.insight: WHO提示冲突加深健康危机：医疗系统被打断后，慢病、孕产与传染病的“次生死亡”往往比直接伤亡更隐蔽。

items.title: Ultra-processed foods linked to 67% higher risk of heart attack and stroke
items.body: Eating large amounts of ultra-processed foods like chips, frozen meals, sugary drinks, and packaged snacks may significantly raise the risk of serious heart problems. In a major U.S. study, people con
items.insight: 超加工食品与心梗中风风险上升的证据继续累积，政策层面可能推动更严格的标签、税收或校园食品标准。

items.title: Belly fat linked to heart failure risk even in people with normal weight
items.body: Carrying extra fat around the waist may be more dangerous than the number on the scale suggests. Researchers found that belly fat was more strongly linked to heart failure risk than BMI, even in peopl
items.insight: 腰腹脂肪与心衰风险关联提醒公众别只看体重；体脂分布可成为更实用的早筛指标，推动体检项目升级。

items.title: Denmark becomes first country in the European Union to eliminate mother-to-child
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO) has certified Denmark for the elimination of mother-to-child transmission (EMTCT) of HIV and syphilis, recognizing the country's sustained commitment to ensuring ev
items.insight: 丹麦消除艾滋与梅毒母婴传播，展示“检测-治疗-随访”闭环的治理能力，为其他国家提供可复制的路径模板。

items.title: Chile becomes the first country in the Americas to be verified by WHO for the el
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO), together with the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO), congratulates Chile for becoming the first country in the Americas – and the second globally – to be off

items.title: Recommendations for influenza vaccine composition for the 2026-2027 northern hem
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO) today announced recommendations for the viral composition of influenza (or “flu”) vaccines for the 2026-2027 northern hemisphere influenza season. The announcement

items.title: WHO Director-General visits Jordan to recognize strong collaboration on health s
items.body: The Director-General of the World Health Organization, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, today concluded the first day of his two-day State visit to the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, underscoring the stro

sections.title: 健康生活

sections.overview: 从LHC发现重的“质子表亲”到阿尔忒弥斯何时重返月球，基础科学与航天计划都在回答同一个问题：我们能否把实验突破变成稳定工程能力。生态与环境议题同样尖锐，鸟类传播塑料污染的机制被进一步揭示。

items.title: Physicists discover a heavy cousin of the proton at CERN’s Large Hadron Collider
items.body: A new subatomic particle known as the Ξcc⁺ has been discovered at CERN’s Large Hadron Collider. This heavy proton-like particle contains two charm quarks and was detected using the upgraded LHCb exper
items.insight: LHC发现重的“质子表亲”拓展强相互作用与重夸克结构认知，基础粒子结果可能在未来反哺探测与计算技术。

items.title: NASA's Artemis missions promise a return to the moon—but when?
items.body: NASA's Artemis II mission plans to fly around the moon and back this April. Four astronauts will board the mammoth Space Launch System (SLS) rocket for the test flight, spending 10 days off-Earth. The
items.insight: 阿尔忒弥斯时间表的不确定，说明载人深空的难点在工程验证与预算连续性；每一次延期都会抬高成本与风险。

items.title: Bird flu risk to Danish cattle: New tool can warn farmers before infection sprea
items.body: Sudden drop in milk production, thickened milk, and cows under movement restrictions. Since 2024, American farmers have had bitter experiences with the feared bird flu (H5N1), which in several cases h
items.insight: 为丹麦奶牛预警禽流感的新工具，强调“早期信号+数据监测”在农业生物安全中的价值，可减少封控与损失。

items.title: Scientists recreated a dinosaur nest to solve a 70-million-year-old mystery
items.body: Scientists recreated a life-size oviraptor nest to understand how these dinosaurs hatched their eggs. Their experiments showed the parent likely couldn’t heat all the eggs directly, meaning sunlight p
items.insight: 复原恐龙巢研究孵化机制，把古生物学从“看化石”推进到“做实验”，为行为推断提供更可验证的证据链。

items.title: How birds are spreading plastic pollution
items.body: Hungry gulls do not only steal our chips and sandwiches. They learn our habits, and look for reliable sources of food. That includes waste treatment centers, landfill or anywhere food waste is concent
items.insight: 鸟类传播塑料污染揭示了人类废弃物进入食物网与迁徙网络的路径，治理需从源头减塑与垃圾管理系统入手。

items.title: Moral metrics: Are corporate algorithms becoming our new moral authorities?
items.body: You check your credit score before applying for an apartment. Your fitness watch tells you whether you slept well enough. A workplace dashboard measures your productivity. Parents can buy devices that

items.title: Workplace nature breaks may cut stress, study finds
items.body: With 76% of adults now reporting stress levels that impede daily function, a new Cornell study points to a low-cost intervention hiding in plain sight: nature. The study, published in March 2026 in Sc

items.title: Why the gender wealth gap is still so stubborn, and what it means for women's we
items.body: Inequality in wealth between men and women has not always received the same attention as similar disparities in employment and earnings. This is perhaps because wealth—things like property, savings an

sections.title: 科学探索

history_today.event: 《汤姆叔叔的小屋》在美国出版
爱因斯坦发表广义相对论重要论文
东京地铁沙林毒气袭击造成重大伤亡
伊拉克战争爆发，美英对伊动武

almanac.fortune: 稳住节奏，先做确定性最高的选择。

daily_question.question: AI生成影视应否强制标注？
options: 必须标注，保护观众知情
无需强制，交给市场选择
只标注商业用途，个人创作不管

quote.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quote.author: Albert Einstein
quote.zh: 在困难的中心蕴藏着机会。
